title: Machine Learning Engineer
description: Build machine learning models using Python, PyTorch, SQL, Docker, AWS, and MLflow. Work with data pipelines and model deployment.

title: Data Scientist
description: Analyze customer data using Python, SQL, Pandas, scikit-learn, statistics, and data visualization. Experience with AWS is preferred.

title: AWS Cloud Engineer
description: Deploy cloud infrastructure using AWS, EC2, S3, Lambda, Docker, Terraform, CloudWatch, and CI/CD pipelines.

title: Backend Developer
description: Build scalable backend APIs using Python, Java, SQL, Docker, REST APIs, PostgreSQL, and cloud services.

title: Product Analyst
description: Analyze product metrics using SQL, Python, Tableau, Excel, A/B testing, dashboards, and business analytics.

title: Data Engineer
description: Build ETL pipelines using Python, SQL, Spark, Airflow, AWS, S3, Redshift, and data warehousing tools.

title: AI Engineer
description: Develop AI applications using Python, PyTorch, NLP, embeddings, vector databases, Docker, and cloud deployment.

title: Business Intelligence Analyst
description: Create dashboards and reports using SQL, Power BI, Tableau, Excel, and data modeling.

title: Software Engineer
description: Develop distributed systems using Java, Python, AWS, REST APIs, Docker, and scalable backend architecture.

title: ML Platform Engineer
description: Support ML infrastructure using Python, Kubernetes, Docker, AWS, PyTorch, data pipelines, and model monitoring.
